Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 337

LARC220 Landscape Visualization II (4 Credits)

Basic techniques and application of various media for graphic communication associated with landscape architecture.

Corequisite: LARC230.

Restriction: Permission of AGNR-Plant Science & Landscape Architecture department; and sophomore standing or higher; and must be in Landscape Architecture program.

Credit Only Granted for. LARC489R or LARC220.
